data.title: Galactic Gold Settles Debt and Grants Options in Equity-Focused Move
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Galactic Gold Corp. ( (TSE:GGAU) ) has provided an update.

Galactic Gold Corp. will settle $25,000 of outstanding debt by issuing 113,636 common shares at a deemed price of $0.22, with the shares subject to a four-month hold and contingent on TSX Venture Exchange approval. The company is also granting stock options for up to 600,000 shares and issuing 200,000 restricted share and deferred units at $0.22, aligning consultants and a director with shareholder interests and modestly strengthening its balance sheet without using cash.

These equity-based moves underscore the junior miner’s reliance on stock-driven incentives and capital management tools typical in the exploration sector. By conserving cash while deepening insider and consultant participation, Galactic Gold is aiming to support ongoing work at its Ontario gold properties and maintain operational flexibility in a capital-constrained resource market.

More about Galactic Gold Corp.

Galactic Gold Corp. is a resource development company focused on advancing its 100%-owned Hardrock West Properties in Ontario, a top-tier gold mining jurisdiction. The company controls 15,000 hectares with over 57 kilometres of strike along two major gold-bearing structures, strategically positioned between Equinox Gold’s Greenstone Mine and Brookbank Deposit, highlighting significant exploration and value-creation potential.

Average Trading Volume: 89,414

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$8.57M

See more data about GGAU stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Kelso Technologies Sets June 4, 2026 AGM and Record Date for Shareholders
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kelso Technologies ( (TSE:KLS) ) has issued an announcement.

Kelso Technologies Inc. has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission in March 2026, submitting a Notice of Meeting and Record Date for its upcoming security holder session. The filing, signed by Chief Executive Officer Frank Busch on March 20, 2026, formalizes regulatory disclosure for U.S. investors and aligns the company with cross-border reporting standards.

The company has scheduled its Annual General Meeting of security holders for June 4, 2026, in Vancouver, British Columbia, with April 16, 2026 set as the record date for notice, voting, and beneficial ownership determination. Kelso will use notice-and-access for both registered and beneficial holders and will pay for delivery to objecting beneficial owners, signaling an effort to streamline proxy distribution while ensuring broad shareholder participation in governance matters.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:KLS) stock is a Hold with a C$0.18 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kelso Technologies stock, see the TSE:KLS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KLS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KLS is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by ongoing losses and only marginally positive operating cash flow, despite improving revenue and positive TTM free cash flow. A conservative balance sheet helps reduce risk, while technical indicators are mostly neutral and valuation remains constrained by negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on KLS stock, click here.

More about Kelso Technologies

Kelso Technologies Inc. is a foreign private issuer listed in the U.S. that operates through a Canadian corporate structure, with its principal executive office in West Kelowna, British Columbia. The company’s common shares trade under Canadian securities regulations, and it engages a transfer agent to manage shareholder communications and meeting logistics, reflecting a dispersed investor base across registered and beneficial holders.

Average Trading Volume: 14,336

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$9.12M

data.title: Webuild wins €117 million smart bypass contract in Piedmont
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Webuild SpA ( (IT:WBD) ) has issued an update.

Webuild, through its subsidiary Cossi Costruzioni, has secured a €117 million contract from ANAS to build the new Mondovì bypass on the SS28 in Piedmont, aimed at easing congestion and improving links between the A6 Torino–Savona motorway and the Cuneo valleys. The 3 km project includes the San Lorenzo tunnel, an artificial tunnel and the Ellero viaduct, which will feature continuous IoT-based structural monitoring to track bridge stability and hydrogeological conditions in real time.

The construction site will employ about 150 workers and adopt circular-economy practices such as full water recovery and reuse, dust-reduction barriers and wildlife protection measures including deterrents and mobile crossings. The contract underscores Webuild’s strategy of leveraging the specialist know-how of Cossi Costruzioni in complex tunnels and viaducts to boost industrial capacity, raise construction standards and reinforce its position in Italy’s strategic transport infrastructure market.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:WBD) stock is a Buy with a EUR3.40 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Webuild SpA stock, see the IT:WBD Stock Forecast page.

More about Webuild SpA

Webuild is a global leader in large, complex infrastructure construction, specialising in sustainable mobility, hydroelectric power, water management and green buildings. Active in around 50 countries with a 120-year track record and €13.6 billion in 2025 revenues, it is listed in Milan and has a strong ESG focus, with most of its backlog aligned to UN sustainable development goals.

Average Trading Volume: 2,926,308

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: €2.33B

data.title: IRSA to Pay Second Interest Installment on 2035 Series XXIV Notes on March 31, 2026
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Irsa Inversiones Y Representaciones SA ( (IRS) ) is now available.

IRSA Inversiones y Representaciones SA, the Argentine real estate and investment group, has fixed-rate Series XXIV notes outstanding in a principal amount of USD 480.45 million, due 2035, reflecting its continued reliance on long-term dollar funding. The notes carry an annual nominal interest rate of 8.00%, underlining the cost of capital in the company’s financing structure.

The company announced that on March 31, 2026, it will begin paying the second interest installment on its Series XXIV notes issued on March 31, 2025, with The Bank of New York Mellon acting as payment agent. The USD 19.22 million interest payment, in which no principal will be amortized and capital outstanding remains at USD 480.45 million, will be distributed to holders of record as of March 30, 2026, underscoring IRSA’s ongoing servicing of its international debt obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (IRS) stock is a Hold with a $16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Irsa Inversiones Y Representaciones SA stock, see the IRS Stock Forecast page.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong TTM profitability/FCF but high volatility) and supportive earnings-call guidance (cash strength, conservative leverage, and execution progress). Valuation is very attractive (low P/E, high yield), but technicals are weak with bearish momentum and the stock trading below key moving averages.

The latest update is out from Lloyds Banking ( (GB:LLOY) ).

Lloyds Banking Group has repurchased 20,500,000 of its ordinary shares on 20 March 2026 as part of its ongoing share buyback programme, with prices ranging between 91.0200p and 94.6600p and a volume-weighted average of 92.7057p. The bank intends to cancel all of these shares, a move that will reduce the overall share count and can enhance earnings per share, signalling continued capital strength and commitment to shareholder returns.

The transaction was executed through Goldman Sachs International, which is acting as broker under instructions issued in late January 2026, reaffirming the structured and pre-announced nature of the capital management plan. Detailed trade-level data for the buyback is being made available to the market in line with EU-derived Market Abuse Regulation requirements, underscoring regulatory transparency and providing investors with granular insight into execution of the programme.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:LLOY) stock is a Buy with a £103.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lloyds Banking stock, see the GB:LLOY Stock Forecast page.

An update from Imperial Brands ( (GB:IMB) ) is now available.

Imperial Brands has continued executing its £1.45 billion share buyback, repurchasing 367,626 ordinary shares on 20 March 2026 at an average price of 3,069.83 pence per share. The shares, bought via Morgan Stanley on the London Stock Exchange, will be cancelled, reducing the number of ordinary shares in issue to 783,272,992.

The cancellation will slightly increase existing shareholders’ proportional ownership and may enhance earnings per share by spreading profits over a smaller share base. The updated share count also provides a new reference denominator for investors and institutions assessing disclosure and transparency reporting thresholds under UK market rules.

data.title: Max Power Mining Raises $20.5 Million to Advance Natural Hydrogen Discovery
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Max Power Mining Corp ( (TSE:MAXX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Max Power Mining Corp. has closed a brokered private placement of 15,805,624 units at C$1.30 each for gross proceeds of about $20.5 million, marking the largest capital raise in the company’s history and featuring prominent investor Eric Sprott as the lead order. The financing, led by Hampton Securities, underscores growing investor confidence in Max Power’s Lawson Natural Hydrogen Discovery and provides funds for analytical testing, resource modeling, seismic data acquisition, additional drilling and general corporate purposes, while also involving significant insider participation structured under Canadian related-party and prospectus exemption rules.

The company plans to allocate the new capital toward advancing the Lawson discovery near Central Butte, including resource estimation work and a confirmatory well to assess commercial potential, as well as expanding its seismic coverage across its Saskatchewan land holdings. The transaction, completed under the Listed Issuer Financing Exemption and not subject to a Canadian hold period, strengthens Max Power’s financial capacity to accelerate exploration and development activities in Natural Hydrogen, potentially enhancing its competitive position in this emerging energy market and signaling heightened strategic interest from both institutional and insider investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MAXX) stock is a Hold with a C$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Max Power Mining Corp stock, see the TSE:MAXX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MAXX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MAXX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and sustained cash burn), partially offset by a debt-free balance sheet. Technicals are supportive due to strong trend vs. moving averages, but overbought momentum indicators increase near-term risk. Valuation is difficult to support given negative earnings and no indicated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on MAXX stock, click here.

More about Max Power Mining Corp

Max Power Mining Corp. is a Canadian exploration company focused on Natural Hydrogen, with its flagship Lawson Discovery located on the 475-kilometre Genesis Trend in Saskatchewan. The company controls what it describes as Canada’s largest permitted land package for Natural Hydrogen exploration and development, positioning it to pursue scalable, repeatable hydrogen projects in a nascent energy segment.

Average Trading Volume: 692,798

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$114.5M

Find detailed analytics on MAXX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Smurfit Westrock Executives Receive Vested Shares Under Long-Term Incentive Plan
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Smurfit Westrock ( (SW) ) has issued an announcement.

Smurfit Westrock has reported the vesting of dividend equivalent units into ordinary shares for several senior executives under its 2024 Long-Term Incentive Plan. President and Group CEO Anthony Smurfit, EVP and Group CFO Ken Bowles, regional CEOs Laurent Sellier and Saverio Mayer, and EVP & Group General Counsel Ben Garren all received net share deliveries following withholding tax deductions.

The transactions, which took place on 19 March 2026 outside a trading venue, relate to dividend equivalents on the first tranche of 2025 RSU conditional awards and were settled on a net basis at a reference price of $38.58 per share. The awards modestly increase direct equity ownership among top management and underscore the group’s continued use of equity-based incentives to align leadership with shareholder interests.

More about Smurfit Westrock

Smurfit Westrock plc is a global paper-based packaging group formed from the combination of leading industry players, focusing on corrugated packaging, containerboard and related paper products. The company serves consumer and industrial customers across North America, Europe, Latin America and other international markets, supplying sustainable packaging solutions for a wide range of end uses.

data.title: Vivenda Reschedules 2026 Financial Calendar to Align Group Reporting
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Vivenda Group S.p.A. ( (IT:VVG) ).

Vivenda Group S.p.A., a Rome-based leader in OOH and DOOH advertising, leverages large-format installations and integrated restoration and real estate capabilities to fund building rehabilitation through advertising revenues. The company has begun exporting this zero-cost sponsored restoration model to the United Arab Emirates and Spain, broadening its international footprint.

Vivenda has revised its 2026 corporate events calendar, postponing the approval dates for its 2025 financial statements to late May and late June and scheduling half-year results for the end of September 2026. The shift is aimed at allowing sufficient time to collect and consolidate subsidiaries’ accounts in line with Italian civil code and consolidated reporting requirements, which may modestly delay disclosure but supports more accurate group-level financial reporting for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:VVG) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vivenda Group S.p.A. stock, see the IT:VVG Stock Forecast page.

More about Vivenda Group S.p.A.

Vivenda Group S.p.A., founded in Rome in 2006, is an advertising concessionaire specialising in Out Of Home and Digital Out of Home formats, with a focus on large-scale installations in high-visibility, landmark locations. The group operates across OOH advertising, architectural restoration via Vivenda Lavori, legal and financial advertising, and real estate redevelopment, centring its model on zero-cost sponsored restorations financed by ad revenues. In recent years it has expanded internationally with Vivenda GCC FZE in Dubai and Vivenda Adv Es in Barcelona to replicate this restoration-driven advertising model in the UAE and Spain.

Average Trading Volume: 38,921

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €5.09M

Learn more about VVG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
